title: Seikoku No Dragonar S01 NC VOSTFR 1080p x265 10bit AAC [Apoca]
description:
# Seikoku No Dragonar  (2014)
![IMAGE ALT TEXT HERE](https://pm1.narvii.com/5861/c840c073a5d23a80df914e46a92d6d98562299e7_00.jpg)


### Résumé
Apprendre à chevaucher et à dresser des dragons vient naturellement à la majorité des étudiants de l'académie Ansarivan Dragonar, excepté pour Ash Blake, connu par ses camarades sous le pseudonyme « le plus grand gamin à problèmes ». Le pauvre Ash est la cible des moqueries de l'école, car il porte une marque spéciale indiquant son potentiel en tant que maître de dragon, il n'a cependant rien de tel en apparence. Son dragon n'est même jamais apparu.
Jusqu'à maintenant du moins. Un jour, le dragon d'Ash s'éveille dans toute sa gloire, mais il semble différent de tous les autres dragons avant lui, puisque c'est une belle jeune fille ! Pire encore, il découvre rapidement que son dragon a du caractère à revendre puisqu'elle l'informe immédiatement qu'elle est la maîtresse et que lui n'est que son serviteur.
Les problèmes d'Ash avec la monte de dragon ne font que commencer.


.

### Résumé
En portant secours à un homme agressé par deux voyous, Seigi reçoit en remerciement une étrange pierre ornée d’un motif qui s’incruste aussitôt dans la paume de sa main. Ce tatouage s’avère être une arme d’une puissance inouïe que deux agents de l’armée américaine ont pour mission de récupérer, avant que les assassins du Royaume du Sélinisthan ne s’en emparent… Alors qu’une guerre menace d’éclater, Seigi va devoir apprendre à maîtriser le glyphe au creux de sa main pour rester en vie...

title: [MrManager] Nasu: Summer in Andalusia (2003) BDRemux (Special Features)
description:
![Nasu](https://i.imgur.com/zoafbpP.png)

(From [Wikipedia](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nasu:_Summer_in_Andalusia)):
Nasu: Summer in Andalusia (茄子 アンダルシアの夏) is a 2003 Japanese anime film by Madhouse, directed by Kitarō Kōsaka – a long-time collaborator of Studio Ghibli and the animation supervisor for Spirited Away and Princess Mononoke. The film was adapted from a short 3-tankōbon manga by Iō Kuroda, entitled Nasu, which was serialized in the Afternoon manga magazine.

![Nasu](https://i.imgur.com/vDoDV7u.png)

This is a remux of the 2024 US Blu-ray by AnimEigo. This is the first time this film has ever been officially released in the United States. Contains both the 5.1 surround and 2.0 stereo Japanese audio tracks, along with newly-created English subtitles and SDH captions by AnimEigo. Also included are the bonus features.

![Nasu](https://i.imgur.com/0vUqHzv.png)

Given this is a remux, no extra encoding was performed to preserve the disc's quality. The video is the original H.264 encoded present on the original disc, and is a 4:3 1080p picture pillarboxed to 16:9. The original Japanese audio, subtitles, and special features are all ripped straight from the disc.


![Nasu](https://i.imgur.com/HojvJjm.png)

Media Summary:
Video Codec: AVC H.264
Audio Codec: DTS-HD MA, AC3
Subtitles: AnimEigo (PGS)


![Nasu](https://i.imgur.com/erhjkg2.png)

See you next time.

# Just Because!

## Series

`SavI0r` | Episodes | ![MyAnimeList][mal-logo] MyAnimeList | ![TVDB][tvdb-logo] TVDB | ![Nyaa][nyaa-logo] Source
--- | --- | --- | --- | ---
**Season 1** | 12 *(S01E01-S01E12)* | [**Just Because!**](https://myanimelist.net/anime/35639 "Just Because!") | [**Just Because!**](https://www.thetvdb.com/series/just-because/seasons/official/1 "Just Because!") | [VCB-Studio][source-vcb], [hchcsen][source-hc], [Pod][source-pod], [TheFantastics][source-fr], [Erai-raws][source-erai], [Kitsunekko][source-ja], [Phantom][source-ar], [Anime Khor][source-fa], [Akiko FS][source-vi]

---

## Release

A complete Dual Audio release encoded in AV1 and OPUS for optimum size and quality. Files are named to support media servers like Plex using TVDB metadata.

`SavI0r` | Codec | Quality | Language | Notes
--- | --- | --- | --- | ---
**Video** | AV1 | 1080p 10-bit | English
**Audio** | OPUS | Stereo (2.0) 96K, Stereo (2.0) 64K | Japanese, English | Japanese Commentary Stereo 64K
**Subtitle** | ASS, SRT | *great* | Japanese, Arabic, English, French, Persian, Portuguese, Spanish, Vietnamese | Signs & Songs, Dialogue
**Chapter** || *yes*

**Encoding Details**:

SVT-AV1-Psy 3.0.2 with Av1an `--photon-noise 2 --target-quality 85 --target-metric ssimulacra2 --probing-rate 4 --probing-speed fast --probe-slow --min-q 8`
```
--preset 4 --crf 28 --color-primaries 1 --transfer-characteristics 1 --matrix-coefficients 1 --keyint 0 --aq-mode 2 --tune 2 --enable-qm 1 --qm-min 0 --qm-max 15 --variance-octile 6 --variance-boost-strength 2 --enable-dlf 2  --spy-rd 1 --psy-rd 0.5
```

> This project is a production with the goal of the smallest video size with moderate subjective compromises to image quality. This is not the hallmark of AV1, but close enough. This release should only contain changes to the video stream and audio tracks. The subtitle and attachment tracks are usually copied from the noted sources. Timings are not adjusted except in cases of extreme delay as a result of mixing sources. - `SavI0r`

![AV1 Logo][av1-logo]

### Source

Thanks to the following sources:

* ![Nyaa][nyaa-logo] [VCB-Studio][source-vcb] - Video, Audio, Chapter
* ![Nyaa][nyaa-logo] [hchcsen][source-hc] - EN Audio
* ![Nyaa][nyaa-logo] [Pod][source-pod] - EN Subtitle
* ![Nyaa][nyaa-logo] [TheFantastics][source-fr] - FR Subtitle
* ![Nyaa][nyaa-logo] [Erai-raws][source-erai] - ES, PT Subtitle
* [Kitsunekko][source-ja] - JA Subtitle
* [Phantom][source-ar] - AR Subtitle
* [Anime Khor][source-fa] - FA Subtitle

title: [HatSubs] One Piece 795-808 (BD 1080p 10-bit Opus)
description:
![Monkey D. Luffy and Sanji who has rejected his family name](https://files.catbox.moe/g2oqis.png)

Translation: Official
Editing: Puto, Giraffebirbyuimumei, Gyro
Additional Song Editing: Notkama, bluesun
Timing: Gyro
Translation Check/Quality Check: Giraffebirbyuimumei
Typesetting: Giraffebirbyuimumei, Gyro
Encoding: Giraffebirbyuimumei

Back for more Whole Cake Island! At one point the idea was that we would release up to 806 for the next batch, since that's where the second CR BD set for WCI ends, and also the final episode with We Can as the opening, but, uh... We wanted to include the first episode that uses Hope. Also Gyro made the fair point that 807 and 808 are the climax of the first stretch of the arc, so it would make more sense to have them here. So, 14 episodes in one go! :D

...Also the CR BDs split the 807-808 double feature into two separate episodes with their own credits. There isn't really any unique content in the individual versions aside from the preview for episode 808, but since it was very little extra effort, we decided to include those separate versions as well, alongside the international preview for episode 807 which has different clips than what's on the Japanese BD. Just to try and keep the main episodes folder from getting too cluttered though, we put all of those files in the Extras folder while leaving only the double feature in the "main" folder.

Video situation is the same as last time: Primarily sourced from the USBDs, due to them not having the low-pass artifacting that's literally constant on the Japanese BDs. But since the USBDs have edited credits, title cards, signs, and logos, and the Japanese BDs sometimes have animation corrections that for some reason didn't make it into the international masters, we overlaid Japanese footage for those parts specifically.

To avoid running into problems playing any of our releases, [please use mpv!](https://iamscum.wordpress.com/guides/videoplayback-guide/)

title: [Kaizen] Jujutsu Kaisen Epilogue scanlation
description:
Scanlation for the Epilogue chapter included in volume 30 of Jujutsu Kaisen; otherwise known as Chapter 271.5 or 272.
As I don't know how scanlations typically function nor are excecuted this was done according to what I had available to me.
Scanned at 600dpi, scaled to uniform Y-axis of 3200px, mild DNR (paper is still visible), greyscaled.

Raws: innit
Scanning: innit
Cleaning: innit
Redraws: Jellyfish
Typesetter: innit
Translator: Jellyfish
Proofreader: innit
QC: Jellyfish

Translation notes:
Sukuna's translation tries to be archaic and sophisticated because "he speaks like a samurai in the 18th century". 
British English with artistic liberties is used as it's the easiest to translate to, note "desu ne".
Page 9's narrator should also include "mutual observation-type" but it was difficult making it sound natural so it was dropped from the TL.

This is a free release done for free by people in university who so happened to have time after their finals, act accordingly.
Contact me if there are any issues.


edits for v2:
Page 4 should be translated as follows, "And you, Ozawa?", "I'm staying in Machida."
Page 9 has "mutual observation-type" re-added
Page 14 should be, "What a light sermon. Almost could've floated away."

title: [KawaSubs] The Apothecary Diaries - S02E19 (CR DUAL 1080p AVC EAC3) [Dual-Audio] [English-Sub] | Kusuriya no Hitorigoto - 43
description:
### **About Release**
--------------------
A release of CR 8000kbps 1080p video with AMZN 224kbps audio with an improved version of subtitles and a signs track for dub watchers, while adding OP & ED karaoke and proper chapters.

> RSS for this release: https://nyaa.si/?page=rss&q=%5BKawaSubs%5D+The+Apothecary+Diaries+-+S02






#### **The Apothecary Diaries - Season 2 Episode 19**
--------------------
![](https://i.kek.sh/CbxvlJwXxKv.png)

### [**祭り**](https://kusuriyanohitorigoto.jp/season2/episodes/43.php)
後宮から連れ去られた猫猫が辿りついた先は、森の奥に隠された里だった。里では丁度祭りが開かれ、猫猫は子翠と共に狐の面をつけて参加することに。社に向かう途中、子翠からこの地の伝承、狐の面の意味を聞く。祭りから戻ってからも拘束もされることない自分の状況、そして翠苓と子翠の行動に違和感を覚えながら、猫猫は翠苓にあることを問い詰める。

### [**Festival**](https://thetvdb.com/series/kusuriya-no-hitorigoto/episodes/10756320)
The village holds a festival. Maomao attends, and Shisui introduces some of the village's history to her.

title: ブラタモリ　東京・三軒茶屋▼三茶の発展は江戸の流行が鍵！？三軒の茶屋は今
description:
ブラタモリ　東京・三軒茶屋▼三茶の発展は江戸の流行が鍵！？三軒の茶屋は今
[総合] 
2025年06月07日 午後7:30 〜 午後8:00 (30分)
東京・三軒茶屋▼今大注目の人気エリア「三茶」。発展の鍵となった「三差路」は江戸の流行が生んだ？昭和レトロな「三角地帯」のルーツとなった戦後のヤミ市＆路面電車の謎

![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/7hFN3PF.png "ブラタモリ　東京・三軒茶屋▼三茶の発展は江戸の流行が鍵！？三軒の茶屋は今")

	旅の舞台は東京・三軒茶屋。賃貸検索ランキング都内ナンバー１という今大注目のエリア「三茶」。今回は数字の“３”を鍵に、街の誕生と発展の歴史に迫る。国道２４６号線と世田谷通りの三差路に謎の道標が！江戸っ子に大流行「大山詣り」の街道が三茶を発展させた？地名の由来となった３軒の「茶屋」驚きの痕跡を発見！狭い路地に飲食店がひしめく昭和レトロな「三角地帯」。そのルーツとなった戦後のヤミ市＆路面電車の秘密とは？

## Series Overview
> Fan Lingxiao, a spiritual pet master with exceptional talents, was plotted against during the Level-A sect promotion competition and was devoured by Kun, his own spiritual pet. When he opened his eyes again, he found himself reincarnated into a young man named “Liu Fengmang” and was imprisoned in the White Mansion’s dungeon. Meanwhile, his own sect, Lingxiao Pavilion, was in a perilous state. To uncover the truth of being devoured by Kun and revitalize his sect, Fan Lingxiao, accompanied by his existing spiritual pets, embarked on a brand-new adventure journey with Gu Ling, Cheng Xi, and Yue Tong.

**Перевод  #1:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [Dream Cast](https://vk.com/jamfans/)
**Перевод  #2:** Профессиональный (закадровый) | [AniLibria.TV](https://anilibria.tv/)

**Субтитры:** Русские надписи, русские (софтсаб) | Multi-8 | Crunchyroll

**Описание:**
Зенос родился в трущобах и не имел никаких перспектив, пока не встретился с целителем. Встреча произвела на юношу такое впечатление, что он посвятил всего себя учёбе, в надежде тоже освоить это ремесло. Впервые Зеносу выпадает шанс, когда искатели приключений приглашают его в своей отряд. Он был так счастлив, что не обращал внимание на мелочи, вроде хренового отношения со стороны сопартийцев и отказа признавать его заслуги и полезность. Увы, через некоторое время это выливается в позорное изгнание из отряда. Зенос снова оказывается на дне жизни, но решает использовать свои с таким трудом приобретённые навыки иным способом: он открывает подпольную клинику и внезапно становится невероятно успешным. Слухи о превосходном целителе, творящем чудеса в городском подполье достигают даже королевского дворца…

>On November 22, 2010 ten missiles strike Japan. However, this unprecedented terrorist act, later to be called "Careless Monday", does not result in any apparent victims, and is soon forgotten. Then, three months later... Morimi Saki, a young woman currently in the United States of America on her graduation trip, gets into trouble in front of the White House in Washington DC, and only the unexpected intervention of a fellow countryman saves her. However, this man, who introduces himself as Takizawa Akira, is a complete mystery. He appears to have lost his memory and he is stark naked, except for the gun he holds in one hand, and a mobile phone in the other. A phone that is charged with 8,200,000,000 yen in digital cash.

**Notes on subtitles:** 
- All subtitles have been checked, and, if necessary, timed to make sure at least the dialogue is in sync with the audio. For languages other than English, I don’t guarantee frame-perfect sign sync, though.

## Series Overview
> "A corporate executive who hates hobbies is trapped in an endless hobby hell at a cultural center!"
> 
> Dotoli Cultural Center. A hot spot for middle-aged people, where they can learn and make friends. On Mondays, it is filled with the scent of ink from calligraphy, and on Saturdays, it is a peaceful place filled with the sounds of the grandmothers' funky town.
> 
> The story of a slightly odd group of grandmothers who end up defending the Dotoli Cultural Center from the destruction brought by Goo Doo-ri, the vice president of Universe Group, and their humorous journey of growth.

## Notes
* From Korea Education Broadcasting Station (EBS)

In collating these 720p - 1080p (from ep 313) rip files (H264 @ 3000 kbps from ep 351 - as HQ compress seems no advantage). - WMA V2 @ 128 kbps - As Ever for compatibility :) ,, no matter the quality opinions (I take best I can find) I have to say thanks to most of the media sources (seems another had trouble sourcing S2) ... Season 4 = 101 - 350  -  IzFanMade   101 - 192 + MyAnimeLive 193 - 350
Season 4 = 351 - 574  -  AnimeXin 
*NB/ All files from Episode 313 are 1080p.
As ever the repeated skippable Intro (after watching over 20 in sequence) is edited out (as are inconsequential - to binging :) - post ads).

PS - As ever I will personally stop my previous seed to relocate all files here. I Thank All who continue to support seeding efforts :) THANK YOU!! This is the joy of a good community :)

ENJOY! :)

PPS/ If you need any of my old torrents or are having trouble downloading one of my 8 permanents, just leave a message on this current thread :) - I do try to keep on top of it (not an easy thing without notification here) but I never know.

title: Akatsuki Luci あかつき るき 3Dお披露目 1st Solo Live『ReALival』「spwn」
description:
# Akatsuki Luci あかつき るき 3Dお披露目 1st Solo Live『ReALival』
2025-06-06-Fri「spwn」

![](https://mei.kuudere.pw/BbyFtxjmd92.png)

https://spwn.jp/events/evt_4vt4IHdD31Y7bSU2wrqD
https://ubgoe.com/projects/897
https://twitter.com/AkatsukiLuci/status/1911348634912006183
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6wAISEieNrQ

````
2025年5月、活動5周年を迎えたVsinger・あかつきるき。
そして6月6日、自身の誕生日に初の3Dソロライブを開催！

タイトル『ReALival』には、
Re（再び）Alive（生きる）ReAL（現実）Revival（再生）Rival（自分との闘い）
5つの意味を重ね、再び歩み出す覚悟を込めました。

節目に立ち、初めて立体で“生きる”姿を見せる夜。
あなたの目で、耳で、心で。
あかつきるきの「これから」を、どうか感じてください。

⚡ 現地チケット先行販売中！
クラウドファンディングサイト〈うぶごえ〉にて受付中！
https://ubgoe.com/projects/897

ReALival──再び、生きる夜。
特別な日を、あなたと一緒に。
````

title: 陰キャだった俺の青春リベンジ 第01-04巻 [コミック][EPUB][DL版] - MangaEpub
description:
![img](https://i.imgur.com/tsVCK0T.png)

# 📚 漫画EPUB情報＆ガイド / Manga EPUB Info & Guide
 
EPUBファイルは、PC・スマホ・メディアサーバーなど様々な方法で閲覧・変換できます。

---

## 📦 ファイル互換性と変換方法 / File Compatibility and Conversion

このEPUBは、[Komga](https://komga.org/) や [Kavita](https://www.kavitareader.com/) のようなメディアサーバーを含め、多くのリーダーで使用できます。

> **EPUBファイルは7-ZipまたはWinRARで開くことができます。**  
> ファイル名に `kcc-` が含まれている場合、ページ順は正しいです。  
> `image_rsrc` が含まれている場合も、**EPUB2CBZ**を使えば正しい順序で画像抽出できます。  
> 📌 **画像（JPG）形式で保存したい場合は、EPUB2CBZでCBZ形式に変換するのが最も簡単です。**

📘 **日本語変換ガイド** – https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV  
📘 **English Conversion Guide** – https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps  
🔗 **EPUB2CBZダウンロード** – https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases  

---

## 🧰 EPUB2CBZとは？ / What is EPUB2CBZ?

[EPUB2CBZ](https://github.com/bust4cap/epub2cbz-gui/releases) は、マンガ用EPUBファイルを画像付きのCBZ（ZIP）ファイルに変換するWindows向けツールです。  

- 日本語インターフェース対応  
- ComicInfo.xmlの自動生成（シリーズ・巻数・右開き対応）  
- 画像だけが必要な場合はオプションをOFFに  
- 出力形式のCBZはZIPとしても開けるため、7-ZipやWinRARで中身を取り出せます  

⚠️ ソフトの不具合などがあれば、ガイド内のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

※ Calibreも代替手段として使用可能ですが、変換精度や右開き対応の面でEPUB2CBZを推奨します。

---

## 📱 EPUB対応アプリのおすすめ (無料) / Software Recommendations (Freeware)

**PC / Mac**  
- [Thorium](https://thorium.edrlab.org/en/) - 高速・軽量で右開き対応のEPUBビューア   

**iPhone**  
- [Books（Apple Books）](https://apps.apple.com/jp/app/apple-books/id364709193)

**Android**  
- [Readera](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=org.readera&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Google Play Books](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.google.android.apps.books&hl=ja&gl=US)  
- [Mihon](https://mihon.app/download/)

---

## 📬 お問い合わせ / Contact

以下の内容に興味がある方は、[こちらのPastebin](https://pastebin.com/8TTL9xJV)に記載のメールアドレスまでご連絡ください。

- 購入した漫画を保存する方法を学ぶ  
- 透かしなしの最新刊漫画の交換  
- Komga/Kavita を使った自分専用の漫画サーバーの作成  

---

If you're interested in:

- Learning how to preserve the manga you purchased  
- Trading/swapping recently released manga with **NO WATERMARKS**  
- Creating your own manga server through **Komga/Kavita**

Please contact me using the details in [this pastebin](https://pastebin.com/04XAsfps).

#### *Audio Cleaned by Krycek702


### Subtitles
| Language | Style | Format | Provided by | Timing by | Styled by |
| :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: |

| ENG | 2014 Ghibli Subtitles | ASS | QxR | izzybell | hydes / izzybell / ZeBenko |
| ENG | Dubtitles (Streamline) | ASS | QxR | izzybell | hydes / izzybell / ZeBenko |
| ENG | Dubtitles (Manga) | ASS | BluexRips | BluexRips | hydes / izzybell / ZeBenko |
| ENG | Dubtitles (Manga Family Friendly) | ASS | BluexRips (edited by izzybell) | izzybell | hydes / izzybell / ZeBenko |
| JPN | Japanese SDH | ASS | hydes | CrashOveride | CrashOveride |

### Notes/Description
You're probably asking yourself, "why should I download this bloat over hydes release?" and that's a fair point. The goal of this release is to be the most complete version of Cagliostro i can muster out of myself.
This also works as a "pick-and-choose" release so you can mux out anything you don't want.

Video - stuck with Hydes' remux of the 2014 JPBD, despite weird chromatic aberration and some questionable color grading choices it's by far the best source for the movie. the old VAP BD has slightly better colors but it's an older (shit) master, interlaced, and poorly encoded, the 4K also is just a smeary upscale of this scan [despite a new scan done for the trailers](https://slow.pics/c/F5DAy9aV).

Audio - JP audio has a wealth of choices. the main track here is still aiming4theaces' 1995 LD cap as seen on hydes' release, It's simply the best sounding mono version of the movie. For completionism I threw the 2014 5.1, 2019 7.1, and 2019 2.0. I didn't have to sync and to be honest they aren't worst sounding things ever. I included an copy of the optical track mostly just for the memes, SpaceHunterM synced it years ago so I didn't have to do anything. The real star of the show here is the English audio, new for this release I have synced the rarely-heard 5.1 mix of the Manga dub and the true Stereo version of the Streamline dub from the VHS (kindly sent to me by SpaceHunterM, capped by RetroCCN, & cleaned by Krycek702), the standard 2.0 and Mono tracks respectfully of both dubs are still included, I also threw in the 2015 family friendly edit as it contains slightly different edits, i had the DVD version but it is basically the same minus one line. All extra isolated tracks from hydes are still included. In the extras I decided to include an MKA full of international dubs (19 dubs in 11 languages) from my old LupinDubs project with some updates, Full credits for all the audio are [here](https://i.imgur.com/lChSaVR.png)

Subtitles - This is the real meat and potatoes, for the first time ever I decided to fully translate the opening credits! (with typesetting help by ZeBenko)
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/OnbpDNi.jpeg)
The main subtitle script is still Discotek's revised 4K subs however for fun I decided to throw in various subs from other releases as well as the 1980 theatrical subs, all OCR'd and re-styled. Dubtitles for all dubs included as well (Note: the family friendly subs are timed for the 4K track but will still be in sync for the 2015 track). I also have included 20 international subtitle track from Netflix (thanks to DragsterPS) 

This is my love letter to what I consider to be an animated masterwork and I really hope you enjoy it!

### Special Thanks
kaleen - providing extras
ZeBenko - help with typesetting
SomeRando - help with international dubs
SpaceHunterM - research and audio syncs
Hydra Spectre - providing extras
Cagliostro Central Discord - good friends
hydes & Crash - for copying of their homework

If you have problems with the release, Contact me on [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/theizzyshow2000.bsky.social), [Twitter](https://x.com/theizzyshow), & on Discord (@izzyzilla2000)
![alt text](https://i.imgur.com/Lor35g5.jpeg)

# Hamatora S01 (2014)
![IMAGE ALT TEXT HERE](https://cdn.myanimelist.net/images/anime/13/75653l.jpg)


### Résumé
Au fil du temps, certains humains ont développé des capacités extraordinaires appelées Minimum qu'ils peuvent déployer quand certaines conditions sont respectées. La police ayant parfois du mal à régler plusieurs affaires, elle n'hésite pas à engager l'agence de détective Hamatora. Dirigée par Murasaki et Nice, deux détenteurs de Minimum, l'agence est connue pour accepter et conclure n'importe quel type de contrat tant que celui-ci est rémunéré. Leur route va ainsi croiser celle d'un mystérieux serial killer ne s'en prenant qu'à des utilisateurs de Minimum.

title: [koala] My Little Monster Season 1 (BD Remux 1080p x264 8-bit FLAC) | Tonari no Kaibutsu-kun
description:
Public version of https://releases.moe/14227/
[Join the Seadex discord server](https://discord.gg/rFwHDKHfJr)

[My Little Monster](https://anilist.co/anime/14227)  
  
video: JPN BD  
audio: Japanese (FLAC 2.0, from USA BD)  
subtitles: full subtitles (Chihiro \[light KFX\]), full subtitles (Chihiro \[heavy KFX\]), full subtitles (Commie), full subtitles (Crunchyroll \[English\]), full subtitles (USA BD), full subtitles (FRA BD), (Crunchyroll \[Portuguese (BR)\]), (Crunchyroll \[Spanish (Latin America)\])  
  
notes:  
the audio was taken from the USA BD due to it having true 24-bit audio, while the JPN BD and FRA BD only had 16-bit; in episode nine, the USA BD audio begins 500 ms earlier than in the JPN BD, so I added a 500 ms container delay to the audio and subtitles to sync them back up. the Chihiro and Commie subtitles were taken from their respective releases here on AB, and the Crunchyroll subtitles were given to me by Jimbo. all dialogue in Chihiro and Commie was restyled to match GJM styling. chapters are from the JPN BD and named by me.  
  
If you wish to use the heavy KFX subtitle track, avoid using mpv, as it does **not** play the opening properly.  
  
[Episode one script comparison (Chihiro vs Commie)](https://diffchecker.com/zcSv0Htm) | [Image quality comparisons](https://slow.pics/c/pd8M0n2Q)

![kooh allah](https://files.catbox.moe/novbbe.png "kooh allah")
